name: MessageComposer
description: Bordered slotted composer surface for SMS or email messaging, with channel tabs, status chip, alert, optional email fields (subject, recipients), text input, sticky or floating formatting toolbar, and a footer with quick actions and a send group.

props.name: channelStatus
props.description: Channel status slot (right side of top bar)

props.name: recipients
props.description: Recipients slot (email only). Pass a ChipInput or a static node.

props.name: recipientsInputId
props.description: DOM id of the focusable recipients control inside the recipients slot. Wires the "to:" label via htmlFor.

props.name: toolbar
props.description: Sticky toolbar slot (embedded in header area)

props.name: floatingToolbar
props.description: Floating toolbar slot (appears on text selection)

states.rationale: The MessageComposer panel is a static surface with no interactive states of its own. Interactive behavior lives on the composed children: Tabs, ChipRegular status, Alert, Toolbar buttons, action Buttons, and the Send ButtonGroup. The floating toolbar visibility is gated by a text-selection effect inside the component.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to next interactive control inside the composer (tab → status chip → toolbar buttons → textarea → action buttons → send)
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Move focus to previous interactive control
keyboard.Type / select / clipboard shortcuts: Native textarea behavior; selecting text triggers the floating toolbar if provided

accessibility.focusManagement: Natural tab order across composed children. The native <textarea> owns text input focus; the floating toolbar appears on selection but does not steal focus from the textarea.

propertyMapping.note: Figma boolean visibility toggle. In code, the alert region renders when an alert ReactNode is passed.
Figma boolean toggles the channel-status group; in code, pass status label + ChipRegular via channelStatus.
Figma boolean toggles the tabs row; in code, pass a Tabs component via the tabs prop.
Figma sub-toggle controlling whether the tab group is rendered inside the tabs slot. Already covered by passing or omitting the tabs prop in code.
Figma boolean toggles the *floating* selection-aware toolbar.
Figma boolean toggles the *sticky* embedded toolbar.

useWhen: Inbox or conversation composer for staff replies (internal or external notes)
SMS reply field with sticky or floating formatting toolbar
Email reply / new-message field with subject and recipient chips
Surface combining channel context (tabs), delivery status, and a focused message-entry workflow
doNotUseFor: A pure plain-text input → use InputField / Textarea
A persistent action bar without text entry → use Toolbar on its own or in a Card footer

knownDeviations.description: Tokens scoped to MessageComposer (--dls-color-component-message-composer-*, --dls-radius-component-message-composer) referenced by the spec do not exist in tokens.json. The CSS currently reuses --dls-radius-component-input and L2 surface/border tokens. Backfilling a component token group is deferred.
